sections.label: THINKING
sections.content:
Looking at the image, the white shape has moved LEFT and is now overlapping with the green shape. The white shape's opening faces LEFT. The green shape is to the LEFT of the white shape. The red blocks are on the LEFT side of the white shape.
Let me check the current state.

sections.label: TOOL CALL: python
sections.content:
<tool_call>
<function=python>
<parameter=code>
# Check current state
seg = current_frame.segmentation
nodes = seg['nodes']
for n in nodes:
    b = n['boundary']
    rows = [p[0] for p in b]
    cols = [p[1] for p in b]
    if n['color'] in ['W', 'N', 'R']:
        print(f"  id={n['id']} color={n['color']} pixels={n['pixels']} rows[{min(rows)}-{max(rows)}] cols[{min(cols)}-{max(cols)}]")

total_green = sum(n['pixels'] for n in nodes if n['color'] == 'N')
print(f"\nTotal green pixels: {total_green}")
</parameter>
</function>
</tool_call>
